module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for session runtime orchestration, model backend abstractions, and the implemented task execution runtime. lib.rs is re-export wiring that re-exports SessionState and TaskState; the session child module owns Session and plain SessionState storage, the model child module owns the backend abstraction and Deepseek backend, and the task child module owns the Task runtime, plain TaskState storage, and the step type. The session/task runtimes were refactored so worker, routing, and step behavior lives in private impl Session and private impl Task blocks in session.rs and task.rs. Session::new spawns Self::spawn_client_worker(Arc::clone(&state)) and Self::spawn_host_worker(Arc::clone(&state)); Task::new spawns Self::event_loop(state, task_rx) and raise() calls Self::run_step(Arc::clone(&self.state), step). session_state.rs and task_state.rs hold only the plain SessionState and TaskState data structs plus new(). The agent between-session network channels carry the SessionMessage envelope (timestamp + source_name + wrapped SessionEvent): Session::new(name) stores the session name in a module static and exposes a static package_message(SessionEvent) -> SessionMessage that the session and its tasks use to stamp outbound events at the network boundary, while internal per-task control channels stay SessionEvent. The crate also ships an executable entry point: main.rs is the marix-agent binary that loads the global Config (exiting on error), exits when config.agent.enabled is false, constructs marix_agent::Session::new(config.name), and parks the main thread forever; agent/Cargo.toml declares the marix-agent [[bin]] target alongside the existing [lib].

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. ModelRequest carries the model-facing task Step and derives only Debug/Clone now that Step is no longer Eq. ModelBackendImpl exposes only send, bridged to ModelBackend by a blanket impl; DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests, and ModelBackendError converts io, serde_json, and reqwest errors.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup plus private impl Session task/event routing behavior behind the agent session namespace. session.rs defines Session (state: Arc<SessionState>, client/host worker handles), whose new(name) stores the name in a SOURCE_NAME static and spawns workers via Self::spawn_client_worker(Arc::clone(&state)) and Self::spawn_host_worker(Arc::clone(&state)), plus the static package_message(SessionEvent) -> SessionMessage; below a // -- Private -- // marker session.rs also holds the private impl Session behavior block (parse_address, spawn_client_worker/spawn_host_worker, run_client_worker/run_host_worker, create_task, route_session_event/route_task_event) whose helpers take Arc<SessionState> or &SessionState, guard the shared client/host SessionMessage endpoints with std::sync::Mutex, accept_channel::<SessionMessage> and unwrap message.event, and package the CreateFailed event via Session::package_message before try_send. session_state.rs is the plain SessionState data struct with only pub fn new().

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the implemented task runtime. task.rs defines Task (state: Arc<TaskState>, task_tx, worker), whose new spawns Self::event_loop(state, task_rx), plus sender() and raise() (Self::run_step(Arc::clone(&self.state), step)); below a // -- Private -- // marker task.rs holds the private impl Task behavior block (build_model_backend, event_loop/run_step plus initial_step/execute_model_step/emit_status/send_event) whose helpers take Arc<TaskState> or &TaskState and stream task status plus forwarded host execution events by synchronously locking client_tx (std::sync::Mutex), packaging each SessionEvent into a SessionMessage via Session::package_message, and calling try_send. task_state.rs is the plain TaskState data struct (signature, std::sync::Mutex-guarded model backend, client/host SharedNetSender<SessionMessage> network senders, the step WorkQueue) with only pub fn new(). step.rs defines the Step record built on the protocol StepSignature/StepStatus contracts; run_step keys the step WorkQueue by step.signature.step_no and initial_step builds a Step whose StepSignature.kind is StepKind::Model(ModelStepKind::Initial) with StepStatus::Prepare; the local task_tx/task_rx control channel stays SessionEvent; mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.
